name: Claude Bridge
description: Route @cc/@ccn/@ccu prefix messages to Claude CLI via tmux, suppressing the default LLM response.

scriptsDir.description: Path to bridge shell scripts directory

scriptsDir.label: Scripts Directory
scriptsDir.help: Absolute path to the directory containing claude-send.sh, claude-new-session.sh, claude-usage.sh

targetId.label: Target ID
targetId.help: Target ID for sending replies (e.g. Telegram chat ID)
